extraction.one_line_summary: MERLIER Tim won bunch sprint after POGACAR took 6 bonus seconds at intermediate sprint 6km from finish, attacking over the top of final climb
tactical_patterns: Pogacar attacked 16.4km out with Powless solo break alive, showing willingness to spend energy before intermediate sprint bonus hunt.
UAE/Jumbo protected GC riders only after break grew to 40km remaining, revealing threshold for when bonus seconds matter.
Quick-Step deployed dual leadout with Senechal positioning Merlier, while Bennett's Bora train fragmented early under Kooij's pace.
Intermediate sprint placed 5.9km to go forced GC riders to commit twice: first for bonuses, then recover for positioning.

rider_signals.POGACAR Tadej: positive: Aggressively hunted 6 bonus seconds at late intermediate sprint, forcing Vingegaard to chase but denying him time bonuses
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: neutral: Made first split when Pogacar attacked on penultimate climb but missed bonus seconds when Pogacar went again
rider_signals.POWLESS Neilson: positive: Attacked twice including solo move at 16.4km, showing early-season form after prior French stage race win
rider_signals.MERLIER Tim: positive: Won from compromised position after Quick-Step's Senechal leadout, Bennett had better train positioning but Merlier had speed
rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: negative: Had Bora leadout with Kooij starting sprint but faded to outside top-3 despite strong positioning
